summary: Completed frontend testing of two new features: 1) PO Number field repositioning in Create PO form, 2) Suppliers page with full supplier management functionality. Both features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings about <tr> and <span> elements in table structure (non-blocking but should be reviewed)

passed_tests: - PO Number field positioned in same row as Status (5th column) - PASSED
- First row contains: Vendor Name, Purchase Date, Payment, Status, PO Number - PASSED
- Notes field has its own row below with placeholder 'Optional notes for this purchase order' - PASSED
- data-testid='po-number' present on PO Number field - PASSED
- data-testid='po-vendor' present on Vendor field - PASSED
- Route /suppliers accessible and loads correctly - PASSED
- Suppliers list shows all suppliers (4 found: Credit Supplier, Test Supplier, Test Supplier Co., Test Supplier Ltd.) - PASSED
- Supplier search input present with data-testid='supplier-search' - PASSED
- Clicking supplier shows stats cards (Total POs, Total Purchased, Total Paid, Pending Payment) - PASSED
- PO list tabs present (All, Unpaid, Pending Delivery) - PASSED
- PO row shows: PO#, Date, Items, Total, Paid, Balance, Delivery status, Payment status - PASSED
- Clicking PO number opens detail dialog with full information - PASSED
- Navigation item 'Suppliers' present in sidebar with data-testid='nav-suppliers' - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows React hydration warnings about table structure in PurchaseOrderPage.js - likely caused by conditional rendering inside <tbody>. Not blocking functionality.
Minor: DialogContent missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility - should add for WCAG compliance.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 4 suppliers found with PO history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features verified working: 1) PO Number field is now positioned in the first row of Create PO form (same row as Status field) with Notes having its own row below. 2) Suppliers page at /suppliers shows all vendors, stats cards, PO history with tabs (All/Unpaid/Pending Delivery), PO detail dialog, and payment history. Navigation item added to sidebar. Test credentials: admin/admin123.
